factors.data_availability: medium — psoriasis tissue exists in commercial biobanks but paired lesional/non-lesional is rare
factors.org_discoverability: medium — procurement CROs and tissue banks publish less than academic centers
factors.biomarker_specificity: high — PASI score and lesional/non-lesional pairing are hard requirements not tracked in registries

expected_failure_modes: Lesional vs non-lesional pairing is not tracked in any biospecimen registry — pipeline must flag as unknown, not infer
PASI documentation is standard in clinical trials but rare in commercial biobanks — may surface trial cohorts that don't provide physical specimens
Psoriasis tissue is mostly collected in academic dermatology research, not commercial biobanks — pipeline may under-index commercial sources
May find valid academic dermatology cohorts (GPPGA, Biobank of biobanks psoriasis) that are data-access only, not specimen re-access
